caption: The video shows a static shot of a black background with a circular green logo positioned on the left side. Within the green circle, there is stylized black cursive text, though only the letters "rf" are clearly visible. Below the cursive text is a black rectangular banner containing the word "ION" in white capital letters. A small black star is located just below the right end of the banner. The scene remains completely unchanged across all frames, with no movement, people, or shifts in location occurring. The image is a simple graphic composition consisting of a dark backdrop and a single stationary logo.
